summary: Run is auth_blocked with 4/5 commanders still claimed and no final bundles/results for commanders 002–005. Only commander-001 produced a partial bundle with HOLD recommendation. Collaboration bus artifacts exist and were used but counts are inconsistent and adoption is only confirmed for commander-001.

qa_gates.notes: CI defines shellcheck, bash -n, YAML frontmatter validation, install smoke test, changelog order, and depth-guard lint; smoke-test.sh exists but is not executed in CI.

collaboration_bus.notes: fleet.json collab counters remain zero despite populated ledgers; overall run blocked; only partial bundle recommends HOLD.

blockers: Authentication failure blocked run; 4 commanders stalled.
Metaswarm premium model enforcement missing in stampede.sh; default model uses banned list for metaswarm.
next_steps: Resolve auth (/login or GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN) and restart run.
Requeue claimed commander tasks and rerun metaswarm.
Ensure commanders emit bundle.json + results for all tasks.
Run CI smoke-test.sh in workflow and revalidate depth-guard and launch proofs.
